dsl_rule.translation_notes: Wide-ranging day approximated as range > atr_14 (volatility multiple). Close near high/low captured as close >= high (long) or close <= low (short). Exit conditions inferred as reversal (close crossing prev_close) since original source was incomplete ('if the close is n'). Direction is context-dependent: long when close near high, short when close near low.

backtest_rule.reason: Wide-ranging day approximated as range > atr_14 (volatility multiple). Close near high/low captured as close >= high (long) or close <= low (short). Exit conditions inferred as reversal (close crossing prev_close) since original source was incomplete ('if the close is n'). Direction is context-dependent: long when close near high, short when close near low.

source_rule_text: When a wide-ranging day occurs with the close near the high or low, trade in the direction of the close as a strong indication of continued direction.
